description: Node temperature monitoring - separate graphs per sensor type per node

panels.description: Rate of CPU thermal throttle events. Only Intel CPUs expose this metric (AMD k10temp does not). Any value above 0 indicates the CPU is throttling due to overheating.

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (rate(node_cpu_package_throttles_total[5m]))

panels.title: CPU Thermal Throttling (Intel only)

targets.expr: node_hwmon_temp_celsius{instance="192.168.20.11:9100", chip=~"pci0000:00_.*"} * on(chip) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance="192.168.20.11:9100"}
node_hwmon_temp_celsius{instance="192.168.20.11:9100", chip=~"nvme_.*"} * on(chip) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance="192.168.20.11:9100"}
node_hwmon_temp_crit_celsius{instance="192.168.20.11:9100", chip=~"nvme_.*"} * on(chip) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance="192.168.20.11:9100"}

max by (chip_name, sensor) (node_hwmon_temp_celsius{instance="192.168.20.14:9100", chip=~"platform_coretemp_.*"} * on(chip) group_left(chip_name) node_hwmon_chip_names{instance="192.168.20.14:9100"})
